typecheck.note: services.yaml has incorrect path 'nim_router/*.py' but actual code compiles correctly when path is corrected to 'scripts/nim_router/*.py'

appliedUpdates.description: The typecheck command path 'nim_router/*.py' is incorrect - should be 'scripts/nim_router/*.py'. This is a pre-existing bug not introduced by this milestone.

notes: SKILL.md is 142 lines (well under 500 line limit)
All required frontmatter fields present: name, description, short-description, aliases, trigger_keywords, metadata
All script paths correctly use {baseDir} prefix
Invocation Patterns section documents all three platforms (Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw)
trigger_keywords added for implicit routing activation
